name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: High-quality wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and premium sound quality. Features comfortable over-ear design and Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity.

description: Comfortable 100% organic cotton t-shirt available in multiple colors. Perfect for casual wear with a soft, breathable fabric and durable construction.

description: 12-cup programmable coffee maker with thermal carafe, automatic shut-off, and brew strength control. Durable stainless steel construction with easy-to-read display.

name: The Midnight Library
description: A bestselling novel about infinite possibilities and second chances. Perfect for readers who enjoy contemporary fiction with philosophical depth and emotional resonance.

description: Non-slip TPE yoga mat with alignment marks, 6mm thickness for optimal cushioning, and included carrying strap. Eco-friendly and perfect for all fitness levels.

description: High-speed USB-C charging and data transfer cable, 6ft length, supports up to 100W fast charging. Compatible with most modern smartphones and tablets.

description: Comprehensive guide to Python programming covering basics through advanced concepts. Includes real-world examples, exercises, and best practices for beginners and intermediate developers.

description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning, breathable mesh upper, and durable rubber sole. Designed for comfort and performance during long-distance runs.

description: Set of three eco-friendly bamboo cutting boards in various sizes. Naturally antimicrobial, durable, and includes juice grooves for easy food preparation.
